name_cn:
Green
PARIS VII Grained Leather Small HOBO Bag
Calfskin drawstring closure, featuring the iconic CASSANDRE pendant, matching suede lining.
Elegant and soft, this bag comes with a card holder and adjustable shoulder strap, offering versatile styling.
Size: 30×25×3cm
Model: 796626
